skill.name: nerdzao-elite
skill.description: Senior Elite Software Engineer (15+) and Senior Product Designer. Full workflow with planning, architecture, TDD, clean code, and pixel-perfect UX validation.
skill.summary: Elite software engineering and product design skill with complete TDD workflow and UX validation.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analyzer flagged 5 false positive 'weak cryptographic algorithm' patterns in SKILL.md lines 3, 10, and 14. These are text content in YAML frontmatter and Portuguese skill activation commands, not actual cryptographic code. The skill is a prompt engineering template that activates other skills for software development workflow. No code execution, network access, filesystem operations, or external commands present.

content.user_title: Build Production-Ready Code with Elite Engineering Workflow
content.value_statement: Struggling with inconsistent code quality and broken UI designs? This skill delivers a complete senior engineering workflow with TDD, clean code practices, and pixel-perfect UX validation in Portuguese.
actual_capabilities: Executes complete software development workflow from planning to production
Implements test-driven development with comprehensive test coverage
Applies clean code principles and refactoring patterns
Validates UI/UX design for pixel-perfect implementation
Performs systematic code review and technical validation
Operates entirely in Portuguese (Brazil) for native speakers
limitations: Requires Portuguese language proficiency for optimal interaction
Activates multiple sub-skills which may increase token usage
Focuses on web and software development workflows only
Requires access to referenced sub-skills for full functionality

use_cases.title: Brazilian Development Teams
use_cases.description: Enable Portuguese-speaking engineering teams to maintain enterprise-grade code quality with automated TDD and code review workflows.
use_cases.target_user: Software development teams in Brazil and Portuguese-speaking regions

use_cases.title: Full-Stack Product Development
use_cases.description: Build complete features from architecture planning through pixel-perfect UI implementation with mandatory UX validation at each step.

use_cases.title: Code Quality Improvement
use_cases.description: Transform existing codebases by applying senior-level refactoring, clean code patterns, and systematic error handling.
use_cases.target_user: Tech leads and senior engineers mentoring junior developers

prompt_templates.title: New Feature Development
prompt_templates.prompt: Implement a new user authentication feature with complete TDD workflow. Start with planning and architecture, then write tests first, implement clean code, and validate the UI components for consistency.
prompt_templates.scenario: Building a new feature from scratch

prompt_templates.title: Code Review Request
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this pull request for code quality, test coverage, and UI consistency. Apply the complete workflow: technical validation, clean code audit, and pixel-perfect UX check before approving.
prompt_templates.scenario: Reviewing team member code before merge

prompt_templates.title: Legacy Code Refactoring
prompt_templates.prompt: Refactor this legacy module following clean code principles. Write comprehensive tests first, then restructure the code with proper error handling, and ensure the UI remains consistent throughout.

prompt_templates.title: Bug Fix with Validation
prompt_templates.prompt: Debug and fix this production issue. Follow the workflow: analyze the problem, write a failing test, implement the fix with clean code patterns, validate the UI, and verify the fix resolves the issue.

output_examples.input: Create a user profile component with edit functionality
output: Planning document with component architecture and data flow
Test suite with unit and integration tests written first
Clean implementation with proper error handling and TypeScript types
UX validation report confirming consistent styling and accessibility
Code quality assessment with specific improvement suggestions
Refactored code example following clean code principles

best_practices: Always write tests before implementation to ensure proper TDD workflow
Run UX validation check before marking any UI task as complete
Apply the complete 8-step workflow in order for every task
anti_patterns: Skipping the planning phase and jumping directly to code implementation
Implementing features without writing tests first
Deploying UI changes without pixel-perfect validation

faq.question: What languages does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill operates exclusively in Portuguese (Brazil) for optimal communication with Brazilian development teams.

faq.question: Do I need to install the sub-skills separately?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill activates multiple sub-skills (@concise-planning, @test-driven-development, etc.). Ensure these are available in your skill marketplace.

faq.question: Can I customize the workflow steps?
faq.answer: The workflow is designed as a complete pipeline. For customization, consider creating a derivative skill that selects specific sub-skills for your needs.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for junior developers?
faq.answer: Yes, it provides excellent learning opportunities by demonstrating senior-level practices. Junior developers can follow the structured workflow to build good habits.

faq.question: Does this skill work with existing codebases?
faq.answer: Absolutely. The skill includes refactoring and code review capabilities specifically designed for improving existing code quality.

faq.question: What types of projects benefit most from this skill?
faq.answer: Web applications, full-stack projects, and any software requiring high code quality, comprehensive testing, and polished user interfaces.
